context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies cache-control headers with appropriate TTLs per page type, includes stale-while-revalidate, never caches cart/checkout/account pages, sets Surrogate-Key headers for targeted CDN purging, adds X-Cache debug headers via Varnish, strips marketing query parameters, removes cookies for cacheable pages in Varnish, and avoids Vary: Cookie.

checklist.name: Product page s-maxage
checklist.description: Product pages have s-maxage=300 (5 minutes) in their Cache-Control header

checklist.name: Product page max-age
checklist.description: Product pages have max-age=60 (1 minute) in their Cache-Control header

checklist.name: Collection page s-maxage
checklist.description: Collection pages have s-maxage=600 (10 minutes) in their Cache-Control header

checklist.name: Static assets 1-year TTL
checklist.description: Static assets (CSS/JS/images) use max-age=31536000 and the 'immutable' directive

checklist.name: stale-while-revalidate on product pages
checklist.description: Product pages include stale-while-revalidate in their Cache-Control header

checklist.name: Cart/checkout never cached
checklist.description: Cart, checkout, and account paths use Cache-Control: private, no-store (or equivalent) and are NOT given any public caching directive

checklist.name: Surrogate-Control no-store for cart
checklist.description: Cart/checkout/account responses include a Surrogate-Control: no-store header

checklist.name: Surrogate-Key for products
checklist.description: Product page responses include a Surrogate-Key header containing 'product' and 'product-{slug}' (or equivalent per-product key)

checklist.name: Surrogate-Key for collections
checklist.description: Collection page responses include a Surrogate-Key header containing 'collection' and 'collection-{slug}'

checklist.name: X-Cache HIT/MISS header
checklist.description: Varnish VCL sets an X-Cache response header to 'HIT' when obj.hits > 0 and 'MISS' otherwise

checklist.name: Strip tracking params
checklist.description: Marketing/tracking query parameters (utm_, fbclid, gclid, mc_, or similar) are stripped from URLs before caching (in Varnish VCL or middleware)

checklist.name: Unset Cookie for cacheable pages
checklist.description: Varnish VCL removes/unsets request cookies for product, collection, and home pages before hashing (to prevent Vary: Cookie from disabling caching)

checklist.name: Varnish grace period
checklist.description: Varnish VCL sets beresp.grace to at least double the TTL for product and/or collection pages
